title: oleandra articulata
intro: Oleandra articulata, also known as the Golden Sceptre Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oleandra articulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antioxidant, protecting the body from oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Oleandra articulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne.
